description:
Description

NIKE Unisex Performance Cushion Crew Socks (6 Pairs) offer the perfect combination of cushioning and comfort. Supportive fit with arch compression. Reinforced heel and toe for enhanced durability. Sizing: Women's Small (4-6), Medium (6-10) & Large (10-13) - Men's Medium (6-8), Large (8-12) & X-Large (12-15)
features: Reinforced heel and toe for enhanced durability in high-wear areas
Rib cuffs for a snug, comfortable fit
Arch support for a secure fit
parentTitle: Nike unisex-adult Performance Cushion Crew Socks With Band (6 Pairs)
style: Performance Cushion Crew Socks With Band (6 Pairs)
title: NIKE Unisex Performance Cushion Crew Socks with Band (6 Pairs), Black/White, X-Small
